examples: We suspect they are trying to hide something, hence the need for an independent inquiry.
The trade imbalance is likely to rise again in 2007. Hence a new set of policy actions will be required soon.
Hence, the Jovian planets are often called giants.
Hence, this entirely reasonable suggestion for a compromise: A mini version of Flash that only handles video.
The long-term consequences will be a problem for a later Congress, 20 or 30 or 40 years hence.
